summary:
The use of glass-ionomer materials provides a suitable balance between biological compatibility and providing adequate thermal insulation while allowing time for further treatment decisions regarding pulpal health management. Suspension liners may be less ideal due to their thickness which makes them better suited as temporary fillers instead of protective barriers during this phase of care.
 Agent1's final summary (
